EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email before logging in
INVALID_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN: Invalid or expired password reset token
DATABASE_NAME_TAKEN: Database name is already taken in this space.
PROPERTY_NAME_TAKEN: Property name is already taken in this database.
PROPERTY_NOT_BELONG_TO_DATABASE: Property does not belong to the same database
PAGE_PAGE_SIZE_MUST_BE_POSITIVE: page and pageSize must be positive integers
NOT_RESOURCE_OWNER: You do not own this resource
USER_EMAIL_EXISTS: User with this email already exists
USER_USERNAME_EXISTS: User with this username already exists
SECTION_NOT_FOUND: Section not found in this space
REGISTRATION_SUCCESS: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account.
PASSWORD_RESET_GENERIC: If this email is registered, you will receive a password reset link.
COOLDOWN_ACTIVE: Please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting a new email.
DEV_USER_NOT_FOUND: No user found for {email} — nothing to reset
INPUT_TOO_LONG: Input value too long for field
